C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
⊢ @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB'' ≤ D

      rw [h₃]
  exact h1
prove

by
  intro N hN
  have h₁ : N ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := hN
  simp only [DirectSumDecomposition.refinement.mem_carrier] at h₁
  obtain ⟨N₀, hN₀, N₁, h₁⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : N₁ ∈ B N₀ hN₀ := by simp_all
  have h₃ : N₁ ≤ N₀ := by
    calc
      N₁ ≤ sSup (B N₀ hN₀) := by
        apply le_sSup_of_mem
        exact h₂
      _ = N₀ := by rw [hB N₀ hN₀]
  exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N₀, by simp_all [Set.mem_iUnion]⟩

by
  intro N hN
  use B N hN
  constructor
  · -- Prove B N hN ⊆ refinement B hB hB' hB''
    intro x hx
    -- x is in B N hN, so it is in the union defining refinement B hB hB' hB''
    simp only [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at *
    refine' ⟨N, _⟩
    refine' ⟨hN, _⟩
    exact hx
  · -- Prove N = sSup (B N hN)
    have h : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
    rw [h]
  <;> simp_all
  <;> try aesop
  <;> try simp_all [Set.mem_iUnion]
  <;> try aesop

by
  refine' fun N hN => _
  obtain ⟨K, hK, hK'⟩ := hN
  refine' ⟨K, _⟩
  aesop
simpa using h₈

by
  intro N hN
  rw [refinement.carrier] at hN
  simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop] at hN
  rcases hN with ⟨N₁, hN₁, hN₂⟩
  have hN₃ : N₁ ∈ D := by
    exact Classical.choose_spec hN₁ |>.1
  refine' ⟨Classical.choose_spec hN₁ |>.2, ?_⟩
  <;> aesop
